name: wordpress-hx
description: Experimental WordPress 7.0 and Gutenberg migration program using Haxe, Codex, and Beads.

scripts.precommit: npm run format:haxe:check && npm run haxe:escape-hatches:check && npm run wphx:php:adapter-raw-blocks:check && npm run baseline:validate && npm run beads:seed && npm run operations:bridge-claim-guardrails:check && npm run receipts:validate && npm run security:gitleaks
